name: Yolanda's Miracle Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425.
2. In a large bowl, combine oat bran, wheat germ, flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
3. In a medium bowl, mix molasses, honey, canned pumpkin, milk, egg whites, and applesauce until well blended.
4. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add the pumpkin mixture slowly, blending well.
5. Spray a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick vegetable oil spray. Spoon the mixture into the cups until they are 3/4 full.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from the tin and serve at room temperature.
